debug_info.goal:

⊢ @AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.IsDiagonalisable (Spec R) G inst✝³ inst✝² ↔
    Submodule.span ↑R {a | IsGroupLikeElem (↑R) a} = ⊤

    have hG : (hopfSpec R).essImage (⟨G.asOver (Spec R)⟩ : Grp (Over (Spec R))) :=
      essImage_hopfSpec.mpr (by assumption)
    have eGrp : (⟨G.asOver (Spec R)⟩ : Grp (Over (Spec R))) ≅
        ⟨(Diag (Spec R) A).asOver (Spec R)⟩ :=
      { hom := Grp.homMk (e.hom.asOver (Spec R))
        inv := Grp.homMk (e.inv.asOver (Spec R))
        hom_inv_id := by ext; simp
        inv_hom_id := by ext; simp }
    -- Lift the group-scheme iso to a `CommHopfAlgCat` iso via `hopfSpec.fullyFaithful`
    let eHopf := hopfSpec.fullyFaithful.preimageIso
      (hG.getIso ≪≫ eGrp ≪≫ hDiag.getIso.symm)
    sorry
  · -- Reverse: `span = ⊤ → IsDiag`.
    -- Establish `NoZeroSMulDivisors R Γ(G, ⊤)` (needed for the bialgebra-level result).

    sorry

end CommRing
